summaryItinerary: Day 1: Ha Noi Arrival – Join Group Ha Noi Afternoon City Tour
Day 2: Ha Noi – Ha Long Bay Day Cruise (Local Lunch)
Day 3: Ha Noi Departure – Phu Quoc Arrival – Private Afternoon Tour to Grand World without Guide
Day 4: Phu Quoc – Private Day Tour to Vinpearl Safari – VinWonder without Guide
Day 5: Phu Quoc – Join Group Day Tour to 4 Islands by Boat – Hon Thom Cable Car
Day 6: Phu Quoc Departure – Da Nang Arrival – Free Leisure
Day 7: Da Nang – Join Group Afternoon Tour to Marble Mountain – Coconut Forest – Hoi An Ancient Town
Day 8: Da Nang – Join Group Day Tour to Ba Na Hills with Golden Bridge

detailedItinerary.title: Ha Noi Arrival – Join Group Ha Noi Afternoon City Tour
details: Arrive in Ha Noi, our driver will take you to hotel for baggage storage
Visit Tran Quoc Pagoda located on Golden Fish Island in West Lake. It is the oldest pagoda in Hanoi built in the 6th century.

Continue to visit Temple of Literature – the first university of Vietnam, The Temple of Literature (Van Mieu Quoc Tu Giam) is one of the most attractive tourist spots in Northern Vietnam. The Temple of Literature was founded in 1070.

Keep going to visit Hoa Lo Prison, the prison was built by the French, from 1886 to 1901, when Vietnam was still a part of French Indochina. The French called the prison Maison Centrale. The prison was called "A Hell on Earth" and now the prison is like a war museum for those who want to understand more about the war against France of Vietnamese people.
Our bus will take you back to the hotel for check-in.
Free leisure and overnight in Ha Noi City

detailedItinerary.title: Ha Noi – Ha Long Bay Day Cruise
details: Our driver will pick you up at hotel to depart for Halong Bay
Our journey follows the Hanoi – Haiphong - Tuan Chau Highway
On the way, we stop for a short break for 30 minutes to relax
Arrive at Tuan Chau Harbor, get on Luxury Cruise with our crew's warm welcome
Enjoy the welcome drink then start the excursion to discover the beauty of the world heritage site
Enjoy Vietnamese lunch on the boat. While having lunch, the boat will pass by the beautiful scenery on both sides with thousands of the limestone.
Arrive at Bo Hon Island, and you will visit Sung Sot Cave – the most beautiful cave with a lot of stalagmites and stalactites
Do kayaking or bamboo boating through Luon Cave to discover the beautiful lagoon.
Visit TiTop Island with its sandy beach. You can go swimming here or trek up to the top of the island for sightseeing all of Halong Bay
Back to the boat for the sunset party (with wine, tea, fruits, and biscuits), meanwhile, the boat is cruising back to the harbor
Arrive back to the harbor. Get on the bus and return to Hanoi
Get dropped off at the hotel.
Overnight in Ha Noi

detailedItinerary.title: Ha Noi Departure – Phu Quoc Arrival – Private Afternoon Tour to Grand World without Guide
details: Do hotel check-out
Our driver will take you directly to the Noi Bai International Airport as your departure flight to Phu Quoc City
Arrive in Phu Quoc City, our driver will take you to hotel for baggage storage
Do hotel check-in
Our driver will pick you up at the hotel and embark on a private afternoon tour to Grand World, a vibrant entertainment complex known as the "Sleepless City."

Explore the various attractions at Grand World, including cultural shows, shopping streets, and unique architectural structures. The complex offers a blend of traditional and modern experiences, providing a lively atmosphere for visitors.
Our driver will take you back to hotel for relax
Free leisure and overnight in Phu Quoc

detailedItinerary.title: Phu Quoc – Private Day Tour to Vinpearl Safari – VinWonder without Guide
details: Our driver will pick you up at the hotel and your private tour begins with a visit to Vinpearl Safari, Vietnam's first and only open zoo. Covering a vast area, the safari is home to a wide variety of wildlife from around the world, including endangered species. Enjoy a tour through the safari, where you can see animals in their natural habitats and learn about conservation efforts.

Head to VinWonders, a world-class amusement park. VinWonders offers a range of activities, including thrilling rides, water slides, and themed zones that cater to all ages. Spend the afternoon experiencing the excitement and fun of this extensive amusement park.
Our driver will take you back to hotel for relax
Free leisure and overnight in Phu Quoc

detailedItinerary.title: Phu Quoc – Join Group Day Tour to 4 Islands by Boat – Hon Thom Cable Car
details: Pick up from your hotel in Duong Dong ward. Visit the Pearl Farm.
Arrive at An Thoi Harbor, board the speedboat.
Visit Coral Park – Sea Walker Experience (Optional activity - Pay by yourself): Walk under the sea and admire colorful marine life.
Stop at Mong Tay Island: Take photos with SUP boards and Flycam.
Continue to Gam Ghi/Buom Island: Go swimming and snorkeling at the coral reef.
Visit May Rut Island: Free time for swimming and relaxing.
Note: Itinerary is subject to change depending on weather conditions.
Arrive at Thom Island: Enjoy the thrilling Aquatopia Water Park, then return via the scenic cable car ride.
Return to your hotel.
Overnight in Phu Quoc

detailedItinerary.title: Phu Quoc Departure – Da Nang Arrival – Free Leisure
details: Do hotel check-out
Our driver will take you to the Phu Quoc International Airport as your departure flight to Da Nang City
Arrive in Da Nang City, our driver will take you to hotel for baggage storage
Do hotel check-in
Overnight in Da Nang

detailedItinerary.title: Da Nang – Join Group Afternoon Tour to Marble Mountain – Coconut Forest – Hoi An Ancient Town
details: Free leisure in the morning
Our Tour Guide and Driver will pick you up at your hotel in the city center and start Marble Mountains, Bay Mau Coconut Forest & Hoi An Acient Town Tour.

Marble Mountain is a complex consisting of Kim (Iron Mountain), Mộc (Wood Mountain), Thủy (Water Mountain), Hỏa (Fire Mountain), Thổ (Earth Mountain) symbolizing for 5 main elements of the universe in Asia Culture. You will discover the mysterious beauty of caves combining the sacred atmosphere of Buddhism. Visiting Tam Thai Pagoda, Linh Ung Pagoda.
You will admire the masterpieces of exquisite stone sculptures created by the skilful hands of artisans in Non Nuoc village at the foot of the mountain.
We continue our trip to visit Bay Mau Coconut Forest Tour, you will be explored in Bay Mau coconut forest space by traditional basket boats.
Departure to visit Hoi An Ancient Town
Take a short break

Visit Hoi An Acient town, with Japanese Bridge. This only remain of Japanses culture is now considered as a symbol of Hoi An. Taking a walk on the street along the Hoai River, enjoy the night life of Hoi An Town.
Car and tour guide will take you back to the hotel.
Overnight in Da Nang City

detailedItinerary.title: Da Nang – Join Group Day Tour to Ba Na Hills with Golden Bridge
details: Our guide and driver will pick you up from your hotel, depart for Ba Na Hill through one of the most beautiful seaside streets of Central Vietnam.

Arrive in Ba Na, you will have a chance to experience the two – UNESCO - record cable system up to the top of the hill and enjoy the beautiful sight of Mo stream, Toc Tien waterfall with the impressive dazzling white spume.
Sightseeing on Ba Na Hill to
Hand of the gods hold Vietnam's Golden Bridge.
L'Jardin Zone with French Architecture Building: Tinh Tâm Garden, French Stable, one hundred-year-old pomelo tree, Old Villas.
Linh Ung Pagoda, 27 meters Buddha Statue, Loc Uyen Garden.
From Debay station, you will get on the second cable system to move to Nui Chua Peak – the rooftop of Da nang City.
Continue the tour with Fantasy Park – one of the most modern indoor game centers of the Asia.
Visit Chua Linh Tu Temple, enjoy a panoramic view of the whole Da Nang city and Da Nang Bay through the mist in a romantic afternoon on Ba Na peak.
Go down by the cable system. Get on coach and return the city centre.
Drop off at your hotel.
Free leisure and overnight in Da Nang City

detailedItinerary.title: Da Nang Departure
details: Do hotel check-out
Our driver will take you directly to the Da Nang International Airport as your departure flight

Accommodation in Ha Noi, Da Nang, and Phu Quoc

Wax Museum, Debay Wine Cellar, Alpine Coaster, 10D Cinema, Climbing games, and prize-winning games with coin in Ba Na Hills
Drink on Cruise, during Meals and Surcharge for Beverages brought on Cruise
